style_effects: Subtle blue energy pulses glow rhythmically along Cubone's steel armor seams, casting sharp reflections of the environment onto its metallic surface. Metallic dust particles drift in slow motion, catching the cold blue-white light that emanates from its core, creating a shimmering aura of precise geometric intensity. The lighting mood is crisp and metallic, with cool blue highlights contrasting against a dark, shadowed backdrop. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
